name: S.A. San Miguel A.G.I.C.I. y F.
summary: S.A. San Miguel A.G.I.C.I. y F. produces and distributes fresh and processed citrus products in Argentina, South Africa, and Uruguay. The company offers fresh fruits, such as grapefruits, organges, lemons, mandarins, avocado, and grapes; and processed foods, including juices and pulps, oils and essences, and peel products. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Vicente Lopez, Argentina.
